cisa_kev.note: CISA KEV mirror on GitHub. Public domain / CC0 according to the upstream repository.

first_epss.note: EPSS API. Used for high-percentile exploitation pressure and KEV enrichment.

threatfox.note: Optional but enabled when ABUSECH_AUTH_KEY is present. Uses recent API plus full export for a 6-month historical approximation where available. The key is never written to output.

urlhaus.note: Optional. Free abuse.ch Auth-Key required. Disabled by default for public/community zero-secret operation.

gdelt.note: Planned for v0.1.4 FIMI-lite narrative spike watch.

euvsdisinfo.note: Planned for v0.1.4 FIMI-lite curated maritime disinformation case watch.

disarm.note: Planned for v0.1.4 FIMI-lite taxonomy tagging.
